subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in the Signs of God, raise not thy voice in lamentation at separation from those dear to thee, nor heave sighs of sorrow at thy heart's bereavement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقنه بایات الله از فراق نوردیدگان ناله و فغان منما و از هجران جگرپارها آه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
